info.name: Ezequiel Torres Art - Artworks
info.description:
Requests for the Artworks ("Arte en Vivo" gallery) module of the Ezequiel Torres Art backend.

Uses the same Local / Cloud environments as the main collection — `baseUrl` and `token` are shared.

Flow:
1. Run **Auth > Login** in the main collection first so `{{token}}` is saved into the active environment.
2. **Create artwork** stores the new `{{artworkId}}` automatically; the by-id / update / delete requests reuse it.

Permissions: GET endpoints are **public** (no token). POST / PUT / DELETE require an **authenticated** user (ADMIN or USER).

request.description: Lists every artwork, ordered by `order` ascending (then by creation date). Public — no token required.
Returns a single artwork by id. Public. Returns 404 if not found, 400 if the id is malformed.
Creates an artwork. Requires a valid `{{token}}`. `imageUrl` and `order` are optional (order defaults to 0). The test script saves the new `_id` as `{{artworkId}}`.
Partial update of an artwork. Any subset of `title`, `description`, `imageUrl`, `order` is allowed. Requires a valid `{{token}}`. Change `order` here to reposition the piece in the gallery.
Deletes an artwork by id. Requires a valid `{{token}}`. Returns a confirmation message plus the deleted document.
